contract_changes: Added evidence comment blocks to download, getProperties, uploadFile, and uploadData postconditions

Evidence sourced from manual code review of erxes/erxes and remotely-save/remotely-save — both repos have unprotected Azure blob calls (scanner reports 0 violations due to detection gap for intermediate variable patterns)
audits.notes: Only 3 repos in corpus use @azure/storage-blob. Scanner reports 0 violations, but manual code review confirms erxes/erxes has uploadFile() without try/catch and remotely-save has download()/uploadData() without try/catch — suggesting scanner has detection gap for patterns accessed through intermediate client variables (e.g., blobClient.download() where blobClient is a local variable from containerClient.getBlobClient()).

contract_changes: Added inline evidence comment block at top of contract with 5-repo list
audits.notes: 5 repos scanned (remotely-save/remotely-save, erxes/erxes, unjs/unstorage, Scale3-Labs/langtrace, zetaloop/desktop). All clean. Detection gap for intermediate-variable patterns persists.
